reactions.title: Reactions
reactions.error: Failed to save reaction. Please try again.

platform.title: Platform
platform.scanDescription: Scan your storage bucket to update the exhibition library.

scan.scanProgressDesc: Listing objects, generating thumbnails, and syncing database. Elapsed: {elapsed}

photoLibrary.confirmDeletePhotos: Are you sure you want to delete {n} photo(s)? This cannot be undone.
photoLibrary.uploadComplete: Uploaded {n} photo(s). Run Sync to generate thumbnails and metadata.
photoLibrary.uploadSizeHint: Up to {maxSize} per file, {maxCount} files per upload

error.notFoundDesc: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or the URL may be incorrect.
error.forbiddenDesc: You don't have permission to access this page.
error.serverErrorDesc: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again later.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your site configuration and preferences.
settings.siteSettingsDescription: Configure basic site information, social links, and fallback SEO content used when exhibition fields are empty.
settings.appearanceSettingsDescription: Configure the public exhibition cover, dates, theme, and sections.
settings.siteNameHint: Displayed in the header. Max 20 characters.
settings.homePageTitleHint: Used as the browser tab title and SEO meta title when the exhibition title is empty.
settings.siteDescriptionPlaceholder: An online exhibition powered by Curatory.
settings.siteDescriptionHint: Used as the search meta description when the exhibition description is empty.
settings.siteUrlHint: Used as canonical URL for SEO.
settings.exhibitionSettingsHint: Configure the single public online exhibition shown by the Exhibition layout. When this layout is active, the public header uses the exhibition title, and SEO title, description, and share image prefer the exhibition settings.
settings.exhibitionDetailsHint: Set the cover, title copy, exhibition dates, and overall theme.
settings.exhibitionCoverProtectionHint: Adds a soft overlay and text shadow so cover copy remains readable on busy photos.
settings.exhibitionSectionsHint: Add sections, adjust their order, or open a section to edit its details.
settings.exhibitionChooseSectionLayout: Choose the layout for this section. The layout cannot be changed after the section is created.
settings.exhibitionSectionFixedLayout: Layout is chosen when this section is created.
settings.exhibitionSectionDetailHint: Edit this section's copy, photos, and presentation details.
settings.exhibitionSectionMissingHint: This section does not exist. Return to exhibition settings and choose another section.
settings.exhibitionReserveTextSpaceHint: Keep the side column even without text
settings.exhibitionLayoutDescription_media: Use one to four photos with optional text placement.
settings.exhibitionLayoutDescription_text: Use title and body text without a photo.
settings.exhibitionPhotoPickerHint: Choose photos for the cover or the current exhibition section.
settings.avatarUrlHint: Also used as site logo. Paste an image URL.
